name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: Deep dish pie crust shell, one each
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in water.
2. In a double boiler over gently simmering water, beat egg yolks.
3. Add 1/2 cup sugar and lemon juice to the beaten yolks. Cook, stirring until the mixture coats the bottom of a spoon.
4. Add grated lemon peel, gelatin, and food coloring (if using) to the custard. Stir well.
5. Let the mixture cool in the refrigerator for about half an hour until it is slightly thickened.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with 1/2 cup sugar. Fold this into the lemon mixture.
7. Add the whipped topping and fold into the batter.
8. Spoon the batter into the baked pie crust shell.
9. Refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours before serving.
10. Garnish with chocolate shavings and lemon slices.
Serves: 8
